name: tef1_Eurotiomycetes
description: Fungal translation elongation factor 1-alpha (TEF1, EF1a) — nuclear protein-coding marker, ~700 bp barcode window — in Eurotiomycetes. Ascomycete class with Aspergillus, Penicillium. Used heavily for Fusarium ID (Geiser 2004) and as a secondary barcode in Schoch 2012. Allow high mismatch.
